common.quotaNear: X conversations left this month — upgrade for more

persona.optimistTooltip: Focus on opportunities and best-case scenarios.

chat.errorQuotaExceeded: Monthly quota reached. Upgrade your plan to continue.
chat.errorAnonymousLimit: Guest trial limit reached. Create an account to continue.
chat.errorStreamInterrupted: The response was cut off (connection or server). Try again in a moment.
chat.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

debate.detailsIntro: Here you’ll find each model’s full answer, and—when available—how aligned they were and any disagreements we detected.
debate.detailsScoreFootnote: This score compares how similar the answers are, not whether they’re factually correct. We don’t flag hallucinations automatically.
debate.detailsEmptyHint: Detail isn’t ready yet — wait a moment or close and reopen this section.
debate.agreementComputing: Working out how much the models agreed…
debate.agreementUnavailable: No agreement score this time—compare the model answers below.
debate.disagreementLead: On these topics the models stress different points — worth comparing:
debate.disagreementLeadFallback: No topic-by-topic breakdown this time — skim each answer above for nuances.
debate.disagreementFallbackBody: The answers don’t line up word for word. Open each one to compare calmly.
debate.pdfPlusOnly: PDF export is available on Plus and above

history.title: History
history.runFirst: Start your first conversation from Chat.

marketing.heroSub: Type or speak. 6 AIs analyze. Manyminds synthesizes.
marketing.step1Desc: Type or speak your question. Choose a persona (Optimist, Devil's Advocate, or Expert).
marketing.step2Desc: Up to 6 AIs answer in parallel. We show how much they agree and where they differ.
marketing.step3Desc: You get one clear answer. Open “View details” anytime to see agreement level, disagreements, and each model’s full reply.

upgrade.title: Get more out of Manyminds
upgrade.subtitle: Upgrade to unlock more conversations and models.
